staff_count: Optimize staff allocation during busy hours.
transactions: Improve checkout flow and POS efficiency to handle higher transaction volume.
queue_length_avg: Reduce queue times by optimizing staffing and pump allocation.
inventory_stockout: Improve inventory replenishment and safety stock levels.
network_quality_index: Investigate network infrastructure to reduce disruptions.
traffic_index: Adjust staffing and promotions based on traffic patterns.
fuel_volume: Improve fuel supply planning and ensure consistent fuel availability.
fuel_volume_91: Review demand patterns for 91 fuel and optimize supply availability.
fuel_volume_95: Review demand patterns for 95 fuel and optimize supply availability.
fuel_volume_diesel: Improve diesel supply planning and align stock with demand.
total_sales: Review sales drivers and improve promotions, pricing, and service availability.
avg_ticket_value: Improve average ticket value through bundling, upselling, and targeted promotions.
avg_rating: Improve customer experience and service quality to increase station rating.
pumps_working: Check pump maintenance and maximize pump availability.
pumps_total: Evaluate whether pump capacity is sufficient for demand levels.
actual_inventory_usage: Improve inventory management and align replenishment with actual usage.
customer_flow_index: Optimize staffing and station operations to better handle customer flow.
competitors_within_3km: Strengthen promotions and service differentiation to compete with nearby stations.
nearby_services_density: Improve station value proposition and service mix to compete with surrounding services.
shutdown_type_partial: Reduce partial shutdowns through preventive maintenance and better operational monitoring.
has_cafe: Evaluate cafe contribution and improve supporting services around food and beverage offerings.
has_convenience_store: Review convenience store performance and improve merchandising and availability.
complaint_type_payment_issue: Investigate payment issues and improve transaction reliability.
complaint_type_queue_delay: Reduce service bottlenecks and improve queue management.
complaint_type_cleanliness: Improve cleanliness standards and monitoring processes.
complaint_type_staff_behavior: Provide customer service training and improve staff interaction quality.
